calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-08-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The cause comes on calendar regularly this day for hear on peitition changing name. Petitioner is sworn. Naum Berg, father present in court. Over objection of the father, the court grants the decree changing minor's name to Svetlana Sonya Sandler.

ADDED TO UNCONTESTED CALENDAR FOR Osc For Change Of Name
Off Calendar Jun-20-2002 Off Calendar
